title: atriplex tornabenei subsp. tornabenei
intro: Atriplex tornabenei subsp. tornabenei, also known as Tornabene's saltbush, is a species of succulent plant in the amaranth family (Amaranthaceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, due to its high concentration of salts. The health benefits of Tornabene's saltbush include its potential to help regulate blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or supplements under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
